Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x10B0 "SHOGUN-720E-10B0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $720e dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Shogun (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $720E to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
